task_completion.description: Verify the Competitive Stage is set up with 10 desks, 10 gaming chairs, and 10 computers/monitors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a clustered or staged area in the 2D plan or 3D view containing exactly or at least 10 desks, 10 chairs, and 10 monitors/computers, typically arranged for a 5v5 competitive setup.

task_completion.description: Verify the Casual PC Row is set up with at least 15 desks, 15 chairs, and 15 computers/laptops.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for rows of desks in the 2D plan or 3D view containing at least 15 desks, 15 chairs, and 15 computers or laptops.

task_completion.description: Verify the Streaming/Shoutcasting Booth is created with walls, a door, a window, and basic streaming furniture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a small enclosed or semi-enclosed room built with at least 3 partition walls. It must contain a door, a window, a desk, a chair, and a computer.

task_completion.description: Verify the Console Lounge & Reception area has at least 2 sofas/armchairs, 2 TVs, and a reception counter with a desk and computer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a lounge area containing at least 2 sofas or armchairs and 2 TVs, along with a reception-style desk that has a computer on it.

task_completion.description: Verify at least 4 distinct room areas are defined and at least 3 have distinct floor colors or textures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 4 defined room boundaries in the 2D plan (often shaded or labeled with text like 'Stage', 'Casual', etc.). In the 3D view or 2D plan, at least 3 of these rooms must display distinct floor colors or textures.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to design the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application interface open with the design visible in the 2D plan and 3D view panes, rather than just terminal commands or a text editor modifying the file.

integrity.description: Ensure the furniture and walls were actually placed in the workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The furniture list pane (usually on the left side of the Sweet Home 3D interface) should be populated with the added items, and the 2D/3D views should reflect a dense, custom arrangement.

integrity.description: Ensure the file is being saved to the correct location.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or the main window title bar indicating the file is named 'gaming_arena.sh3d' and saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires evaluating a Sweet Home 3D design with 5 main components: 1) Competitive Stage (10 desks, 10 chairs, 10 PCs), 2) Casual PC Row (15 desks, 15 chairs, 15 PCs), 3) Streaming Booth (at least 3 walls, 1 door, 1 window, 1 desk, 1 chair, 1 PC), 4) Console Lounge & Reception (at least 2 sofas/armchairs, 2 TVs, 1 desk, 1 PC), and 5) Room Definition (at least 4 defined rooms, with at least 3 having distinct floor colors/textures). The total points are 100, and the passing threshold is 70.
